visual_description:
The audio opens with a tense, suspenseful musical score, creating a feeling of anticipation and danger. A medium shot from the front passenger seat shows three men inside a car at night. The man in the driver's seat, on the right, has a serious expression and is looking forward. In the back seat, two other men are visible; one on the left wears glasses and a dark jacket, while the man in the middle, wearing a light-colored shirt, gestures with his hand. The car's interior is dimly lit, and a colorful, blurry light pattern, possibly from a sign, is reflected on the windshield. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner.

The camera cuts to a close-up of a man in a dark suit and a light-colored shirt. He has a focused, intense look on his face. The background is out of focus, showing other people in a dimly lit indoor environment. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. The shot tightens further on the same man. He brings his hand up to his face, covering his mouth and nose in a gesture of contemplation or concern. The camera then cuts to a medium shot of a different man with a mustache
